title: Aptitude Assessment - Set 1
description: Comprehensive timed test covering Numerical, Reasoning, Quantitative, and Verbal skills.

title: Aptitude Assessment - Set 2
description: Second comprehensive timed assessment covering Numerical, Reasoning, Advanced Quantitative, and Verbal skills.

title: Aptitude Assessment - Set 3
description: Third comprehensive timed assessment covering Numerical, Reasoning, Advanced Quantitative, and Verbal skills.

title: Aptitude Assessment - Set 4
description: Fourth comprehensive timed assessment covering Numerical, Reasoning, Advanced Quantitative, and Verbal skills. All questions are newly authored and independently verified; the Advanced Quantitative and Reasoning Ability section is calibrated roughly 20-30% harder than a standard set.
